title: Loot 4 Everyone
description:
No more exploring to find an already looted structure.
With this data pack, all players will be able to loot structures.
body:
No more exploring to find an already looted structure.\
With this data pack, all players will be able to loot structures.

# Loot this DataPack solves:
- **Elytra in End City Ships:**
  > Vault opened with _Chorus Fruit_. Granted Elytra

> More loot/structures will be added in future versions
